message:
Preserve markdown files in release workflow

Add separate artifact upload for generated .md files in Build job and
download step in Release job. The upload-pages-artifact action strips
markdown files, so we preserve them separately to prevent Release job
failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,6 +93,14 @@ jobs:
         with:
           path: ./dist
 
+      - name: Upload markdown files for release
+        if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: markdown-files
+          path: dist/**/*.md
+          retention-days: 1
+
       - name: Deploy PR Preview
         if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
         uses: JamesIves/github-pages-deploy-action@v4
@@ -176,6 +184,12 @@ jobs:
           mkdir -p dist
           tar -xf artifact/artifact.tar -C dist
 
+      - name: Download markdown files
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: markdown-files
+          path: .
+
       - name: Fix index.md naming
         run: |
           [ -f dist/.md ] && mv dist/.md dist/index.md || true
